meta.title: Modern Websites and AI-Powered SEO for Queensland Businesses
meta.description: People-first Queensland digital studio. Modern websites, AI search and SEO, social, and consulting for trades and service businesses ready to grow. Direct, fast, simple.

hero.eyebrow: A people-first digital studio on the Gold Coast
hero.heading: We make websites, and Google simple.
hero.sub: Modern websites and AI search visibility for Queensland trades and service businesses ready to grow. We rebuild outdated sites to be found by AI, ranked on Google, and ready to turn visitors into bookings.

pillarsIntro.heading: Four services. Built for how Queensland businesses grow.
pillarsIntro.sub: Each one stands on its own. Together, they compound.

pillars.name: Websites
pillars.heading: Websites that get found and get bookings.
pillars.oneLiner: Custom-designed, fast-loading websites — with the brand identity to match — on Shopify, Squarespace, WordPress, or Framer, built to be found by humans and AI.
bullets: Custom design and brand identity (logos, brand systems)
Optimised for Google and AI search

pillars.name: Search
pillars.heading: SEO and AI search that gets you found.
pillars.oneLiner: Technical and local SEO plus Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) — so you show up on Google and in answers from AI search engines.
bullets: GEO for AI search engines and Google AI Overviews
Local SEO and Google Business Profile

pillars.name: Social
pillars.heading: Social that sounds like you.
pillars.oneLiner: Done-for-you social media across Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok — written to match your brand, not a template.

pillars.name: AI
pillars.heading: AI tools and automation that save you time.
pillars.oneLiner: Custom AI strategy, workflow automation, and senior technical direction — including fractional CTO support — for businesses that want expert thinking without a full-time hire.
bullets: AI strategy and workflow automation (Zapier, Make, custom GPTs)
Training so your team can run with it

testimonials.heading: What clients say
testimonials.sub: Real feedback from Queensland business owners we've worked with.

items.quote: Jerrell has been providing organic socials to my business since December. His expertise, his ability to research and form conclusions, and the strategies have produced organic leads and engagement.
items.author: Phil S — Bondi

items.quote: I Love Digital has been a great experience for me. Their professionalism and outstanding service towards detail and support is unmatched. I highly recommend I Love Digital to anyone looking at generating new leads and promoting their business digitally.
items.author: Leon S — Robina

items.quote: Jerrell and the team at I Love Digital are awesome. Extremely knowledgeable with great communication. Would highly recommend.
items.author: Jay S — Burleigh

founder.heading: Product thinking. Two decades in the making.
paragraphs: I'm Jerrell. I run I Love Digital from the Gold Coast — solo. No big team, no account managers, no offshore handoff. You talk to the person doing the work.

Before this, I spent years as a product manager growing an engineering team and shipping web and mobile products, and before that in recruitment and finance. That background is why projects here get scoped properly, run on clear timelines, and reported on the way a board would expect — not just designed to look nice.

process.heading: Simple from the first call.
process.sub: No complicated onboarding. No marketing jargon. Just four clear steps.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.body: A 15-minute conversation about your business, your goals, and what's not working. No pitch.

steps.title: Strategy and proposal
steps.body: A clear plan and a transparent quote. You'll know exactly what you're getting and what it costs.

steps.title: Build and launch
steps.body: I get to work. You get regular updates. We launch when you're 100% happy.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.body: This is where most agencies disappear. I stick around to keep things working and improving.

audit.heading: Get a free website audit.
audit.sub: Not ready to commit to a project? Send us your URL. Within 3 business days you'll get back a 5-minute Loom walkthrough and a written PDF report covering technical issues, urgent fixes, and a 3-month action plan. No obligation. No catch.

belowLink.label: Or see the full audit details →

items.question: What does I Love Digital do?
items.answer: I Love Digital is a people-first Queensland digital studio that designs and builds websites and brand identities, runs AI search and SEO campaigns, manages social media, and offers tech consulting for Australian trades and service businesses.

items.question: Where is I Love Digital based?
items.answer: I Love Digital is based on the Gold Coast in Queensland, Australia. We work with clients across Queensland and Australia, with a focus on Gold Coast and Brisbane service businesses.

items.question: Who do you work with?
items.answer: We work primarily with Queensland trades and service businesses turning over $500,000 or more annually, with 3 to 50 employees — including solar installers, electricians, builders, retailers, and professional services.

items.question: What's different about working with I Love Digital?
items.answer: I Love Digital is run solo by Jerrell Niu, backed by two decades of product management, technology, and business experience. Clients work directly with the person doing the work, get faster turnarounds than a traditional agency, and pay less than they would for equivalent senior talent at a larger studio.

items.question: How much does a new website cost?
items.answer: Website pricing depends on platform, complexity, and ongoing requirements, so we don't publish a fixed price — get a free quote and we'll come back with clear, itemised pricing. Onboarding fees are always separate from any monthly retainer, and everything is quoted in Australian dollars.

items.question: What is AI Search (GEO)?
items.answer: GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) is the practice of optimising a website so it can be found, understood, and cited by AI search engines and Google's AI Overviews. It sits on top of traditional SEO and is becoming critical as more searches move to AI platforms.

finalCta.heading: Ready to talk?
finalCta.sub: A 15-minute call. No pressure, no pitch, just a real conversation about your business.
